description: You are an HR compliance officer conducting a weekend email activity audit. Identify all emails in the inbox sent on a Saturday or Sunday and move them to a new folder named 'Weekend-Review'. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/weekend_audit_report.txt containing the total count of weekend emails found and a list of their subject lines. Draft a notification email to hr-director@company.com with the subject 'Weekend Audit Complete' and a brief summary of your findings in the body.
